{{Quote|Eh? Who are you, then? The only new people that come to Junix Nard's cantina are longtime losers and bounty hunters. I don't have to tell you why the two don't mix well. Please keep any blaster fire to a minimum.|Junix to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Junix Nard''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. He was the owner and [[Bartender/Legends|bartender]] of the [[Junix's Joint]] [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He also ran a small store within the cantina where he sold [[Pazaak/Legends|pazaak]] cards, among other goods.

Like others on Tatooine, Nard felt that the destruction of [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] at the hands of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] was a good thing, as it "got things moving in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]". He also held the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in low regard, saying that it was "about time someone kicked the Republic in the tail". Furthermore, Nard thought of Tatooine as an unpleasant, backwater [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that had little going for it.

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], four thousand years after the [[Jedi Civil War]], the cantina kept the name of Junix.
